privileged_info_summary: The task requires updating a MedinTux Manager configuration file (Manager.ini) located at /home/ga/.wine/drive_c/MedinTux-2.16/Programmes/Manager/bin/Manager.ini to change the database connection host to 192.168.10.50 and port to 3307. The agent must create a backup file named Manager.ini.bak before making changes. All metadata claims (target_host, target_port, config_filename, backup_filename, and wine_prefix) are verified as accurate and consistent across task definition, setup scripts, and verification logic. The data operated on is synthetic—the Manager.ini file is created by the setup script from a template rather than sourced from external data.
